variants: Rakel Steinthorsdottir is a qualified professional in the field of Dance Therapy, holding a professional license known as the Phoenix Handler Credential. She is affiliated with the Verdigris Luthiers Society, where she explores the intersection of music and movement. Under the guidance of her mentor, Niklas Forsling, she has developed a unique therapeutic approach that utilizes dance as a healing modality. Her innovative work is supported by the Horizon Climber Consortium, which provides her with essential funding to advance her research and practice.
